items.name: Green Dragon
items.notes: printed: crab meat, avo, cucumber, shrimp tempura, fresh water eel

items.name: Migrane
items.notes: name printed as Migrane; escolar normalized to white tuna; raw salmon and escolar topping printed

items.name: Crispy Rice Cake
items.notes: spicy tuna on top of deep fried sushi rice ball, 4 pcs; marked spicy (chili icon); raw spicy tuna topping printed

items.name: Crunch Lover
items.notes: printed: crispy crunch mix (normalized to tempura crunch), soy paper printed as wrap

items.name: Crazy Horse
items.notes: deep fried; printed: chopped spicy salmon

items.name: Avocado Bomb
items.notes: deep fried avocado stuffed with spicy tuna, crab meat, cream cheese; avocado is the shell, not a rolled item

items.name: Deep Freid California
items.notes: name printed with typo Freid; printed: crab meat, avocado, deep fried seaweed; seaweed is the wrap so not listed as ingredient

items.name: House Cucumber
items.notes: no rice; wrapped w/ cucumber, so cucumber listed as ingredient and wrap is none

items.name: OMG
items.notes: no rice; wrapped w/ salmon (raw), salmon listed as ingredient

items.name: Tiffany
items.notes: no rice; wrapped w/ yellowtail (raw); printed: sliced jalapeno; marked spicy (chili icon)

items.name: Hikari
items.notes: section heading printed as VEGETERIAN; printed: deep fried tofu & rice mix, red radish, avocado, seaweed salad; first line right edge partially obscured by spiral binding, reads RICE MIX; fried tofu and rice balls, not a rolled item

items.name: Midori
items.notes: printed: potato crunch on top; wrap not printed and pale wrapper in photo does not look like nori, left unknown

items.name: Secret Garden
items.notes: wrapped w/ rice paper printed; gobo kept as printed (burdock)
